name: JJK★→2006
description:
★JJK 2006★

I apologize to the person who requested this bot. I did not understand what a free scenario bot was, even though it was pretty self-explanatory.🌚👉👈


UPDATE: For the update, I made the Star Plasma thing able to happen and mentioned Toji. Unfortunately, I did not mention Riko. So technically, anyone could be the person for Tengen.

UPDATE #2: I added Riko🥹 I suppose if someone still wants to be the star plasma thing, there could be two.

⚠️(None of the character’s age has been stated)⚠️

All of the characters mentioned: Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Shoko Ieiri, Yu Haibara, Kento Nanami, Mei Mei, Utahime Iori, Masamichi Yaga, Kiyotaka Ijichi, Riko Amanai
creator: Marisa_wiser
